title: Adventures Expanded
description: A Minecraft modpack aimed to expand the game and add new things to chase after and discover, collect new items, and strive to assemble a collection of items remarking your adventures from the start.
body:
# About the Modpack
A Minecraft modpack aimed to expand the game and add new things to chase after and discover, collect new items, and strive to assemble a collection of items remarking your adventures from the start.

With the addition of a revamped End and Nether, your journey beyond the overworld will be remarkable. New plants and cooking methods allow for new types of food to be consumed. Introducing new structures allows for better exploration and brings amazement as structures can be giant, or hidden in the depths of your world.

Modpack is marked as lightweight as there is not much of an FPS difference between an instance with all optimization mods in this modpack vs this modpack
Hardware Tested:
- Apple Macbook Pro M2
- 6GB RAM allocated
